name: Exosister Martha
name_jp: エクソシスター・マルファ
desc: If you control no monsters, or only Xyz Monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Exosister Elis" from your Deck. You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except "Exosister" monsters. If a card(s) moves out of either GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 "Exosister" Xyz Monster, using this face-up card you control as material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon.) You can only use each effect of "Exosister Martha" once per turn.

(This is treated as an Xyz Summon.) You can only use each effect of "Exosister Martha" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
